description: Production-ready S4 (Funding Divergence) archetype config - Short squeeze pattern targeting 12 trades/year, PF 2.22 in bear markets
_comment_purpose: S4 detects short squeezes during bear markets when funding rates are extremely negative (shorts overcrowded). Bear/volatility specialist pattern.
_comment_lineage: Based on s4_optimized_config.json (PF 2.22 on 2022 data, 34% improvement over baseline)
_comment_target_performance: 12 trades/year in bear markets, 55.7% win rate, PF 2.22, fires only in negative funding extremes
_comment_regime_behavior: BEAR SPECIALIST - fires in risk_off/crisis regimes, abstains in bull markets (expected and desired)

regime_classifier._comment_regime: No override in production - let GMM classify naturally. S4 is regime-aware and will abstain in bull markets.

ml_filter._comment_ml: ML filter disabled - S4 is rare enough (12 trades/year) that filter would cause false negatives

fusion._comment_fusion: High threshold (0.99) effectively disables legacy tier1 fallback trades - S4 archetype only

risk._comment_risk: Conservative risk settings for bear market short squeeze pattern

archetypes._comment_daily_limit: Reduced from 8 to 3 for production - prevents overtrading during volatility spikes
archetypes._comment_S4: S4 Funding Divergence - SHORT SQUEEZE specialist for bear markets

funding_divergence._detection_philosophy: Detect extreme negative funding (shorts overcrowded) + price resilience (no follow-through) → short squeeze setup
funding_divergence._note_fusion: S4-specific fusion threshold. Calibrated to ~12 trades/year on 2022 data. Was 0.7824 (TOO HIGH - above p99.5, caused zero trades). Fixed to 0.65 (~1.4% of bars, 125 candidates/year with cooldown).
funding_divergence._note_final_gate: Final gate after regime routing. Must match fusion_threshold for consistency.
funding_divergence._note_funding: Maximum (most negative) funding z-score allowed. -1.976 = ~97.5th percentile negative. Must be MORE negative than this to qualify. Optimized from -1.80 to -1.976 for higher quality.
funding_divergence._note_resilience: Minimum price resilience score [0,1]. Measures price stability despite negative funding. 0.555 optimized from 0.60. Higher = stronger resilience required.
funding_divergence._note_liquidity: Maximum liquidity score allowed [0,1]. Lower liquidity = thinner orderbook = easier squeeze. 0.348 optimized from 0.25 (more permissive captures more opportunities).
funding_divergence._note_cooldown: Hours between S4 trades. Prevents overtrading same squeeze event. Optimized from 12 to 11.
funding_divergence._note_risk: Position size as % of capital. 2% is conservative for bear market volatility.
funding_divergence._note_stop: Stop loss as multiple of ATR. 2.282 optimized from 2.50 (tighter stops improved PF).
funding_divergence._note_runtime: S4 enriches dataframe with funding dynamics, resilience, volume, and liquidity features at startup
funding_divergence._note_funding_lookback: Hours to look back for funding rate calculation
funding_divergence._note_price_lookback: Hours to look back for price resilience calculation

weights._comment_weights: S4 fusion score = weighted combination of 4 signals

funding_divergence._expected_trades_year: 12 trades/year in bear markets (2022 data), near-zero in bull markets
funding_divergence._expected_distribution: Concentrated in risk_off/crisis regimes. 2023 bull market = 0 trades is CORRECT behavior.
funding_divergence._regime_dependency: BEAR SPECIALIST - do not expect consistent performance across all market conditions
_historical_examples: FTX Aftermath (Dec 2022): Funding -3.01σ → violent short squeeze
August 2022 Short Squeeze: Funding -2.53σ → documented squeeze event

funding_divergence._note_trail: Trailing stop as ATR multiple. Capture squeeze momentum.
funding_divergence._note_time_limit: Exit if position still open after 48h. Squeezes are fast events.

routing._comment_routing: Regime-specific archetype weight multipliers. S4 is bear specialist.

risk_on._comment: Reduced weight in bull markets - negative funding rare but possible

risk_off._comment: Primary operating environment - bear market short squeezes

crisis._comment: Increased weight during extreme stress - highest squeeze probability

feature_flags._comment: All 6 domain engines enabled for S4 (Wyckoff, SMC, Temporal, HOB, Fusion, Macro)

validation_results.oos_2023h1_note: Zero trades expected and desired - bull market had no negative funding extremes

deployment_notes: S4 is a BEAR MARKET SPECIALIST - do not expect consistent performance in all regimes
Deploy as part of multi-archetype portfolio, not standalone
Monitor funding rate extremes - S4 fires when funding < -2σ
Expect 0-5 trades in bull markets, 10-15 in bear markets
OI data limitations may affect recent periods (2023-2024) - monitor data availability
known_limitations: Regime dependency: Poor performance outside bear/crisis regimes
OI data gaps: May miss signals if funding/OI data unavailable
Fast squeezes: Tight time windows (48h) - requires responsive execution
Correlation: May cluster with other bear archetypes (S5, S1) - manage portfolio exposure
complementary_archetypes: S5 (Long Squeeze): Opposite direction, positive funding extremes
S1 (Liquidity Vacuum): Capitulation reversals, different entry logic
Deploy S4+S5 together for funding-based strategy (both directions)
operator_checklist: 1. Verify funding rate data feed is live (required for S4)
2. Confirm regime classifier is running (determines S4 activation)
3. Monitor for S4 signals during bear markets (expect 1-2/month)
4. Check position limits - S4 can fire multiple times in short windows
5. Review stop losses - bear markets have high volatility
